General.Name: Paliburg Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Paliburg Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the property investment and development, construction and building, and hotel ownership and operations businesses in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and internationally. It operates through Property Development and Investment; Construction and Building Related Businesses; Hotel Operation and Management and Hotel Ownership; Hotel Operation and Management and Hotel Ownership; Asset Management; Financial Assets Investments; Aircraft Ownership and Leasing; and Others segment. The company develops, leases, and sells properties; and provides estate agency and management services. It also engages in the construction works and building related businesses, including the provision of development consultancy, project management, and property management services; and develops and distributes security systems and products, and other software. In addition, the company owns, operates, and rents hotels; offers hotel management and asset management services to Regal REIT; trades in financial assets at fair value through profit or loss; and provides other financial assets investments. Further, it owns and leases aircraft; provides financing services; sells food products; operates and manages restaurants; operates security storage lounge and retail shops; offers housekeeping and related services; and provides security systems and software design, development, and distribution services. Additionally, the company offers construction engineering, management, nominee, lighting technology, mechanical and electrical engineering, property development consultancy, estate management, security and guarding, passenger service, vehicle ownership, licenses and trademark holding, and room reservation services, as well as involved in food and beverage operations. The company was incorporated in 1993 and is headquartered in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. Paliburg Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of Century City International Holdings Limited.
General.Address: 68 Yee Wo Street, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
